examples: Some men ended up with a male equivalent of postnatal depression, he said.
The study also underlined how postnatal depression among mothers is much more common.
Another 18% of mothers of multiples were not sure if the feelings they had amounted to postnatal depression.
The body of Karen Simpson, who was known to have postnatal depression (PND), was found yesterday.
Postnatal depression is a condition that is thought to affect one in ten new mothers.
